subject: Re: hair cuts
body:

From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>

Sent: Wednesday, July 11, 2007 11:31:23 AM
Subject: Fw: hair cuts


You will laugh... Zuzana sent me an email with haircuts she picked for me. 
She is funny.. She told me yesterday that I walk as if I was wearing a cosmodisc, she asked why I always wear the same shoes :-) and told me to get a haircut...
Now she wants to take me shoe shopping :-)

Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld
